languages.text: Техножрецы, населяющие Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17, откликнулись на призыв Вольного Торговца и приглашают посетить их обитель для обоюдовыгодного обмена информацией.
The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have responded to the Rogue Trader's hail and invite you to visit their abode for a mutually beneficial exchange of information.
languages.original_text: Техножрецы, населяющие Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17, откликнулись на призыв Вольного Торговца и приглашают посетить их обитель для обоюдовыгодного обмена информацией.

languages.text: 卡利西斯祭坛17号的技术神甫们回应了行商浪人的呼叫，并邀请你造访他们的居所，进行互惠互利的信息交换。
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have responded to the Rogue Trader's hail and invite you to visit their abode for a mutually beneficial exchange of information.

traits.locale_text: 卡利西斯祭坛17号的技术神甫们回应了行商浪人的呼叫，并邀请你造访他们的居所，进行互惠互利的信息交换。

languages.text: Los tecnosacerdotes de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 han respondido a la llamada de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente y te invitan a visitar su morada para un intercambio de información mutuamente productivo.
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have responded to the Rogue Trader's hail and invite you to visit their abode for a mutually beneficial exchange of information.

traits.locale_text: Los tecnosacerdotes de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 han respondido a la llamada de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente y te invitan a visitar su morada para un intercambio de información mutuamente productivo.

languages.text: Les technoprêtres d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 ont répondu à l'appel {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} et vous invitent à leur rendre visite pour un échange d'informations bénéfique aux deux parties.
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have responded to the Rogue Trader's hail and invite you to visit their abode for a mutually beneficial exchange of information.

traits.locale_text: Les technoprêtres d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 ont répondu à l'appel {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} et vous invitent à leur rendre visite pour un échange d'informations bénéfique aux deux parties.

languages.text: Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin Tekno Rahipleri, Hür Tacir'in çağrısına yanıt verdi ve sizi karşılıklı yarar sağlayan bir bilgi alışverişi için meskenlerini ziyarete davet ediyorlar.
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have responded to the Rogue Trader's hail and invite you to visit their abode for a mutually beneficial exchange of information.

traits.locale_text: Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin Tekno Rahipleri, Hür Tacir'in çağrısına yanıt verdi ve sizi karşılıklı yarar sağlayan bir bilgi alışverişi için meskenlerini ziyarete davet ediyorlar.

languages.text: Die Techpriester von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 haben auf den Ruf des Freihändlers reagiert und laden dich zu einem für beide Seiten vorteilhaften Gedankenaustausch ein.
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have responded to the Rogue Trader's hail and invite you to visit their abode for a mutually beneficial exchange of information.

languages.text: アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17のテクプリストが、ローグトレーダーの呼びかけに応じ、互いに有益な情報交換のために、彼らの住処に訪れるよう招待しています。
languages.original_text: The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have responded to the Rogue Trader's hail and invite you to visit their abode for a mutually beneficial exchange of information.

traits.locale_text: アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17のテクプリストが、ローグトレーダーの呼びかけに応じ、互いに有益な情報交換のために、彼らの住処に訪れるよう招待しています。
